failure.symptom: Requires Lemmy backend API. Bug confirmed via source: Markdown.svelte renderer map lacks 'escape' token handler. Escaped characters (like \* \>) are not rendered. Fix adds 'escape: MdText' to the renderer map so escaped chars display as plain text.
failure.recommendation: 跳过，需 Lemmy 后端。Bug：Markdown 渲染器缺 escape token 处理，转义字符不显示
